steps.title: Identify what needs specifying
steps.content: The goal is to specify the location of Ctesiphon. The notes directly provide where it is: near present-day Baghdad, Iraq.

steps.title: Match the choice that includes this geographic information
steps.content: Choice D provides exactly this: it identifies Ctesiphon and states it was “located near present-day Baghdad, Iraq.” The other choices either focus on dates, territory, or identify it as capital without specifying its location. That matches choice D — D is correct.
